name: python3-toolz
title: python3-toolz
summary: List processing tools and functional utilities
description:
List processing tools and functional utilities
A set of utility functions for iterators, functions, and
dictionaries.  These functions interoperate well and form the
building blocks of common data analytic operations. They extend the
standard libraries itertools and functools and borrow heavily from
the standard libraries of contemporary functional languages.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-toolz because List processing tools and functional utilities.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-toolz as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-toolz with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-toolz --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
